state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass and all scope boundaries are respected. The implementation is complete.

## Summary

Created the **first file of the new `internal/generate` package**, faithfully porting the duplicate-rejection seam of the CommitStaged orchestrator:

**`internal/generate/dedupe.go`** — two pure, stdlib-only helpers:
- `firstLine(msg string) string` — allocation-free `head -1` via `strings.IndexByte(msg, '\n')` + `strings.TrimSpace` (ports `subject = head -1 commit_msg`). Godoc cites PRD FR30, decisions.md §3, reference_impl.md §1/§2.
- `isDuplicate(subject string, subjects []string) bool` — a pure EXACT, case-sensitive, byte-equal `==` linear scan (no trim/lowercase/Levenshtein; fuzzy explicitly deferred to v1.1). Godoc cites PRD FR31/FR32, decisions.md §3, reference_impl.md §1/§2, names `git.RecentSubjects(50)` (P1.M3.T4.S1) as the subjects source, and states the trim-responsibility boundary.
- Uses a plain `package generate` line with an adjacent file-level comment **deferring** the `// Package generate` doc to generate.go (S1) — mirroring the `internal/git/log.go`-defers-to-`git.go` precedent exactly (no blank line between comment and package line).
- Imports only stdlib `strings`.

**`internal/generate/dedupe_test.go`** — white-box `package generate`, stdlib `testing` only, table-driven `t.Run` subtests with `tc := tc` capture:
- `TestFirstLine` — 7 cases (single-line, ★multi-line→line-1, ★whitespace-trim, CRLF, empty, whitespace-only-first-line, trailing-newline).
- `TestIsDuplicate` — 9 cases (★exact-match-true, no-match, ★case-differs, ★near/paraphrase ×2 [fuzzy NOT done], internal-whitespace-differs, empty-slice, nil-slice, empty-subject).
- `TestDedup_FirstLineThenIsDuplicate_WhitespaceTrimmed` — end-to-end pipeline proof (whitespace-bearing multi-line msg → `firstLine` trims → `isDuplicate` exact-matches → true; plus a non-matching case → false).

**Validation (all gates passed):**
- L1 `go build ./internal/generate/` ✅
- L2 `go vet ./internal/generate/` ✅
- L3 `gofmt -l internal/generate/` empty ✅
- L4 `go test ./internal/generate/` PASS (17 subtests + end-to-end) ✅
- L5 `go test ./...` whole-module green (config/git/prompt/provider/ui unaffected) ✅

**Scope respected:** only the two new files created; `go.mod`/`go.sum`/Makefile/main.go untouched (no diff); stdlib-only imports; no `go mod tidy`; no go-git/testify; `generate.go` (S1) and `rescue.go` (S3) NOT created.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Created internal/generate/dedupe.go (func firstLine + func isDuplicate, pure stdlib-only helpers with package-doc deferral to generate.go mirroring internal/git/log.go) and internal/generate/dedupe_test.go (white-box package generate, table-driven subtests covering all MOCKING contract scenarios plus the end-to-end trim-then-match proof). All 5 validation gates passed: go build clean, go vet clean, gofmt clean, go test ./internal/generate/ PASS (17 subtests + end-to-end), go test ./... whole-module green. Scope boundaries respected: only the two new files created, go.mod/go.sum untouched, stdlib-only imports (strings; testing), no go-git/testify, generate.go (S1) and rescue.go (S3) not created."
}
```

All 5 validation gates passed: go build clean, go vet clean, gofmt clean, go test ./internal/generate/ PASS (17 subtests + end-to-end), go test ./... whole-module green.
